REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1 Roanoke St, San Francisco, Ca 94131)
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Laura Fouke.

The property sold for $855,000.00 for 100% interest. The Court confirmed sale of an undevided one third (1/3) interest of the Estate in the amount of $285,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for July 10,2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
